title: Module 12 Exam — Git workflows: GitHub Flow, GitFlow, trunk-based

_meta.description: 6 вопросов покрывающих GitHub Flow, GitFlow, Trunk-Based и decision matrix

questions.question: Concept комплекс: какой workflow подходит для какого case?

options.text: GitHub Flow (main always production, short feature branches, ~90% DE SaaS); GitFlow (main+develop+feature/*+release/*+hotfix/*, для versioned products: mobile, library, packaged software); Trunk-Based (direct commits в main with feature flags, FAANG-level high velocity, requires mature infra); Solo dev = direct push to main

questions.explanation: Каждый workflow optimized для разного. Match определяется: deploy frequency (continuous -> GitHub Flow/TBD; bi-weekly -> GitFlow), product type (SaaS -> GH Flow; mobile/library -> GitFlow), team size + maturity (small -> simple; mature large -> TBD). Нет 'one workflow fits all'. Понимание trade-offs > заучивание команд.

questions.question: Команда dbt из 10 DE, SaaS продукт, daily auto-deploy на BigQuery. Какой workflow и почему?

options.text: GitHub Flow. Match factors: SaaS (continuous deploy fit), medium team (10 DE — sweet spot), no versioned releases (просто rolling forward), CI/CD mature (dbt parse/test on PR, auto-deploy on merge). GitHub Flow = main always production, feature branches 1-3 days, PR + CI + review -> merge -> auto-deploy. ~90% DE teams именно так. GitFlow overhead не нужен (нет release versions); TBD overkill (10 DE managable без TBD complexity)

questions.explanation: Classic DE SaaS setup. GitHub Flow simplicity matches team scale. CI gates main (no needs для release branches). dbt-specific CI: dbt parse, dbt run/test on staging, sqlfluff. Deploy on merge через GitHub Actions / dbt Cloud. Feature flags если нужно large change — но через GH Flow + flags, не TBD. Junior productive в этом setup в 2-3 weeks.

questions.question: Hotfix в GitFlow процедура?

options.text: (1) git switch main && git pull (latest release); (2) git switch -c hotfix/v2.0.1-null-fix; (3) implement fix + commit; (4) git switch main && git merge --no-ff hotfix/...; (5) git tag -a v2.0.1 -m 'Hotfix 2.0.1'; (6) git push origin main --follow-tags; (7) КРИТИЧНО: git switch develop && git merge --no-ff hotfix/... — иначе fix потеряется в next release (regression!); (8) git branch -d hotfix/...

questions.explanation: Hotfix dual-merge — critical pattern GitFlow. Хотфикс solves prod issue (новый patch release tag на main). Но develop branch продолжает с фичами для next major release. Без merge hotfix в develop -> next release из develop не имеет fix -> buggy код в проде опять. Это известная ловушка GitFlow, multiple teams потеряли часы на debugging регрессии. Discipline: всегда merge hotfix BOTH в main+develop. То же для release branches.

questions.question: TBD lifecycle нового dbt mart `customer_ltv` за 4 дня?

options.text: Один big PR в конце недели

Day 1 AM: PR #1 'scaffold mart with flag OFF' (placeholder SELECT 1) -> merge -> main updated, prod не affected. Day 1 PM: PR #2 'add real LTV logic' -> merge -> flag still OFF в prod. Day 2: PR #3 'add tests' -> merge. Day 2 PM: enable flag для 5% canary через LaunchDarkly UI (не git). Day 3: monitor metrics, gradual rollout до 100%. Day 4: PR #4 'remove flag, cleanup dead code'. 4 PR, each small, each safe — production controlled через flags, не git
Push прямо в main без PR

questions.explanation: TBD canonical pattern. Granular PRs, each merges to main, production safety через flags. Rollout decoupled от deploy: code в проде с day 1 (flag OFF), feature activated через config server gradually. Metrics-based rollout decisions. Final PR — flag removal + dead code cleanup (critical для tech debt management). 4-day cycle для feature — невозможно через GitFlow (release process), trudno через GitHub Flow (один большой PR), naturally fits TBD.

questions.question: Hybrid workflow examples в реальных DE командах?

options.text: (1) Apache Airflow: GitHub Flow + release branches (v2-5-stable, v2-6-stable) для supported versions; (2) Many SaaS dbt teams: GitHub Flow + tagged releases (без release branches, просто markers); (3) Mobile companies: GitFlow без release branches (только develop + main + feature + hotfix); (4) FAANG-adjacent: TBD на core кодбаз + GitHub Flow на peripheral repos. Pure workflows редко match real needs — hybrids нормально и common

questions.explanation: Real-world hybrid examples illustrate principles. Apache Airflow combine GitHub Flow для active dev + release branches для customer support across versions. SaaS dbt teams: tags заменяют release branches (deployment artifacts, no separate branches). Mobile с GitFlow lite (без release/* — just develop+main+feature+hotfix). FAANG: разные репо разный workflow. Hybrid = adapting к specific team needs, не cargo cult копирование template.

questions.question: Junior DE в продуктовой компании 2026 года в 90% случаев работает по GitHub Flow или его варианту.
questions.explanation: Да. DE командах SaaS / internal analytics / dbt repos / Airflow company репо — это primary workflow. Hybrid OK (с release branches для legacy support, с tagged releases для deploy markers). GitFlow редкость в DE (~5-10% — versioned libraries или legacy enterprise). TBD редкость в junior-heavy teams (требует mature infra и culture). Освой GitHub Flow first — это твоё primary знание. Через 1-2 года, если попадёшь в large platform team — possibly TBD. GitFlow столкнёшься редко.
